name: maze of caves
description: I'm in a maze of caves
hints: Another cave maze junction. Multiple paths lead in different directions.
SOUTH and NORTH both lead to familiar areas. WEST goes to a dead-end area of the maze.
Go SOUTH to reach the hill foot (room 14) or NORTH to the main junction. EAST to room 12.
notes: Cave maze room with four exits. NORTH to main junction (room 7), SOUTH to hill foot (room 14), EAST to room 12, WEST to dead-end maze room (room 19).
